TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: D. J. Augustin hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'aras mari' tpucing tay suruw. kawas te 1987, byacing te 11 ru 10 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Louisiana, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 183 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 83 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 2008 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Charlotte Bobcats. qnxan nya 2005 kawas 8 byacing msbehuy,qutux ngasal musa beh New Orleans . raral ga,hiya mqwas biru Hightower maki Missouri City,Texas hiya tmosoq mqwas biru maki Brother Martin pqwasan Biru. 2006 kawas 5 byacing 28 ryax,kwara Hightower seto sangka' tmasoq pqwasan Biru maki Toyota Center Houston,Texas . ryax na Brother Martin ,Augustin rasaw hlahuy magal sazing tequtux. Augustin ga four-star.2006 kawas kwara Amerika magal tetzyu point-guard ru tepayat qeru unro na squilq. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *. *. auɣus~ɕtin ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pʔaras~ɕ mariʔ tpuʦ~ʨiŋ taj s~ɕuruw. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te ** ru ** rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa louis~ɕiana, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, ** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu ʦ~ʨħarlotte βoβʦ~ʨats~ɕ. qnxan nja **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ms~ɕβeħuj,qutux ŋas~ɕal mus~ɕa βeħ new orleans~ɕ . raral ɣa,ħija mqwas~ɕ βiru ħiɣħtower maki mis~ɕs~ɕouri ʦ~ʨitj,texas~ɕ ħija tmos~ɕoq mqwas~ɕ βiru maki βrotħer martin pqwas~ɕan βiru. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax,kwara ħiɣħtower s~ɕeto s~ɕaŋkaʔ tmas~ɕoq pqwas~ɕan βiru maki tojota ʦ~ʨenter ħous~ɕton,texas~ɕ . rjax na βrotħer martin ,auɣus~ɕtin ras~ɕaw ħlaħuj maɣal s~ɕaziŋ tequtux. auɣus~ɕtin ɣa *our-s~ɕtar.**** kawas~ɕ kwara amerika maɣal tetzju point-ɣuar* ru tepajat qeru unro na s~ɕquilq. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: D. J. Augustin hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'aras mari' tpucing tay suruw. kawas te 1987, byacing te 11 ru 10 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Louisiana, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 183 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 83 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 2008 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Charlotte Bobcats. qnxan nya 2005 kawas 8 byacing msbehuy,qutux ngasal musa beh New Orleans . raral ga,hiya mqwas biru Hightower maki Missouri City,Texas hiya tmosoq mqwas biru maki Brother Martin pqwasan Biru. 2006 kawas 5 byacing 28 ryax,kwara Hightower seto sangka' tmasoq pqwasan Biru maki Toyota Center Houston,Texas . ryax na Brother Martin ,Augustin rasaw hlahuy magal sazing tequtux. Augustin ga four-star.2006 kawas kwara Amerika magal tetzyu point-guard ru tepayat qeru unro na squilq. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *. *. auɣus~ɕtin ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pʔaras~ɕ mariʔ tpuʦ~ʨiŋ taj s~ɕuruw. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te ** ru ** rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa louis~ɕiana, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, ** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu ʦ~ʨħarlotte βoβʦ~ʨats~ɕ. qnxan nja **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ms~ɕβeħuj,qutux ŋas~ɕal mus~ɕa βeħ new orleans~ɕ . raral ɣa,ħija mqwas~ɕ βiru ħiɣħtower maki mis~ɕs~ɕouri ʦ~ʨitj,texas~ɕ ħija tmos~ɕoq mqwas~ɕ βiru maki βrotħer martin pqwas~ɕan βiru. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax,kwara ħiɣħtower s~ɕeto s~ɕaŋkaʔ tmas~ɕoq pqwas~ɕan βiru maki tojota ʦ~ʨenter ħous~ɕton,texas~ɕ . rjax na βrotħer martin ,auɣus~ɕtin ras~ɕaw ħlaħuj maɣal s~ɕaziŋ tequtux. auɣus~ɕtin ɣa *our-s~ɕtar.**** kawas~ɕ kwara amerika maɣal tetzju point-ɣuar* ru tepajat qeru unro na s~ɕquilq. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
